channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sen. Ron Johnson Supports Compensation for Alleged Government Abuse Victims but Opposes Future Immunity Provisions
item.description: A debate has emerged among Republicans over proposals associated with President Donald Trump’s effort to compensate individuals who claim they were harmed by federal investigations and prosecutions re...

item.title: SPLC Asks Court to Investigate Whether DOJ Improperly Released Superseding Indictment to the Media
item.description: A legal dispute has intensified between the U.S. Department of Justice and the Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC), with the organization accusing federal officials of violating grand jury secrecy rule...

item.title: How AI-Native Specifications Reduce Errors in AI Coding Agents
item.description: The article discusses a recurring problem in modern software development: AI coding agents often produce code that unintentionally breaks existing systems, even when given clear requirements. The auth...

item.title: Fox News Poll Shows Democratic Leads in Key Ohio Senate and Governor Races
item.description: A new Fox News poll suggests that Republicans may face significant challenges in several high-profile Ohio races ahead of the upcoming elections. The survey found a notable decline in President Donald...

item.title: Report Says Trump Plans to Nominate Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche for Permanent Attorney General Role
item.description: According to a report cited by CNN, President Donald Trump is expected to formally nominate Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to serve as the nation's attorney general, potentially as early as Wedn...

item.title: Lauren Boebert criticizes lack of transparency over GOP lawmaker Tom Kean Jr.'s prolonged absence
item.description: Republican Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has publicly expressed frustration over the prolonged and unexplained absence of fellow Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey. According to reports, Kean h...

item.title: A Retrospective of Henri Gray's Belle Époque Posters and Contributions to French Graphic Art
item.description: The article highlights the life and artistic legacy of Henri Gray (1858–1924), a French illustrator and poster artist born Henri Boulanger who worked during the Belle Époque, a period known for its fl...

item.title: Andrew Berry Praises Jared Verse as Key Piece of Browns’ Return in Myles Garrett Trade

item.title: Rep. Randy Fine suggests banning commentator Hasan Piker from the United States after UK entry denial
item.description: Republican Rep. Randy Fine of Florida has sparked controversy after suggesting that progressive political commentator Hasan Piker should be banned from entering the United States. The comments came af...

item.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna alleges activist made physical contact during confrontation at event
item.description: Representative Anna Paulina Luna, a Republican from Florida and ally of President Donald Trump, has alleged that an anti-war activist physically struck her during a recent confrontation. The incident ...

item.title: Four House Republicans join Democrats in vote to limit Trump’s war powers, CNN reports

item.title: Media Analyst Says Scott Pelley’s Dismissal Could Trigger Newsroom Backlash and Legal Disputes at CBS
item.description: The article discusses reactions to the reported firing of veteran CBS journalist Scott Pelley and the potential consequences for the network. According to the report, CNN media analyst Brian Stelter d...

item.title: Senate hearing turns contentious as Treasury Secretary Bessent and Sen. Wyden clash over Epstein-related allegations
item.description: A Senate hearing on Wednesday became highly contentious after a heated exchange between U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Ron Wyden. The confrontation centered on allegations related to J...

item.title: Trump Displays Chart Comparing Reflecting Pool Project to Major Skyscrapers During Oval Office Remarks
item.description: President Donald Trump drew attention during a press event in the Oval Office when he presented a chart related to the renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool. The visual compared the dimen...

item.title: Trump Criticizes CNN and Targets Reporter Kaitlan Collins During White House Press Conference
item.description: During a White House press conference on June 3, 2026, President Donald Trump criticized CNN and singled out CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins while responding to questions from the media. The exchange occ...

item.title: Judge Orders Trump's Name Removed From Kennedy Center as Dispute Raises Questions About Its Future Funding and Management
item.description: A federal judge ruled that President Donald Trump's name must be removed from the Kennedy Center within two weeks and blocked a planned two-year closure for renovations. The decision was celebrated by...

item.title: House Passes Resolution Limiting Presidential War Powers in Iran After Four Republicans Join Democrats
item.description: The U.S. House of Representatives approved a resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump's authority to continue military operations involving Iran without congressional authorization. The mea...

item.title: Former Federal Prosecutor Criticizes Oversight of Trump's South America Bombing Campaign
